jobs.title: Senior Communications Consultant – German Media & Strategic Communications
jobs.description: ISD is an independent, non-partisan, non-profit organisation dedicated to safeguarding elections, freedom, national security, public safety and individual rights by reversing the rising global tide of polarisation, extremism, foreign interference and authoritarianism. Combining research and analysis with government advisory work and the design and delivery of training, education and communications programs, ISD works to implement real-world, evidence-based responses to these challenges. Why work for ISD? ISD is not your ordinary think tank. We turn research into action that changes the world. Our insights don't gather dust on shelves - they power the fight to protect democracy and human rights on the front lines. We're committed to delivering real change, from the grassroots to the highest levels of global institutions. And we're looking for passionate individuals who share our commitment to making a difference. Join us and be part of an organisation that's making an impact. ISD's Guiding Principles of integrity, collaboration, agility and courage define who we are as a team and an organisation. These principles reflect our culture and guide the way we work and the choices we make.

jobs.title: Remote MPH: Health Policy & AI Data Trainer
jobs.description: A leading AI research organization seeks an AI Data Trainer to enhance health models. Candidates should hold a Masters in Public Health, have a strong foundation in epidemiology and biostatistics, and possess analytical writing skills. This fully remote contract offers competitive pay at $35-$55/hour with flexibility ranging from 10-40 hours weekly, challenging advanced public health scenarios, and engaging with cutting-edge AI technology. J-18808-Ljbffr

jobs.description: A cutting-edge AI solutions company is seeking experienced quantitative professionals to evaluate AI-generated work and design quantitative problems in a fully remote setting. Ideal candidates should have at least 2 years of relevant experience, proficiency in statistical methods, and comfort coding. This role offers flexible scheduling and competitive pay, enabling you to impact the future of AI systems directly from anywhere including Australia. J-18808-Ljbffr
